name: myco
description: Agent-First symbiotic cognitive substrate. Seventeen fungal-named verbs (germinate/fruit/molt/winnow/ramify/senesce/assimilate/sporulate/traverse + graft for substrate-local plugins), editable-by-default install, substrate-local plugin loading via .myco/plugins/. Every v0.5.2 verb alias still works through v1.0.0.
